violations.text: Salad dressing portioned into deli containers for sale was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Establishment bottled homemade salad dressing in hermetically sealed containers. Salad dressing was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment to put dressing in deli containers, with 7 day date mark. Establishment to store dressing under 41DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Dessert items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door stand up in the kitchen and on the low boy on the fry line. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and back dish wash area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the main kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items that do not belong to the establishment were observed in one side of the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
